limitations: No quantified dollar amounts or headcount figures tied specifically to PPL's own AI investment were found in the excerpts; the joint venture capex figures relate to generation infrastructure for data center customers, not PPL's internal AI spend.
AI use cases named (asset planning, grid management, cybersecurity) are described as strategic objectives without deployment status or quantified outcomes, limiting concreteness score to 3.

The $1.4 billion Mill Creek Unit 6 NGCC figure relates to generation construction for data center load growth, not AI infrastructure investment by PPL itself, and is therefore excluded from capex_mentions.
